title: UN SYSTÈME DE FILTRE MULTICOUCHE BIO-INSPIRÉ UTILISANT DES ADSORBANTS DE BIOCHAR POUR L'ABSORPTION DE L'EAU ET DES NUTRIMENTS
description: A bio-inspired multilayer filter system using biochar adsorbents was developed to retain water and nutrients from agricultural runoff. Tested as an experimental prototype in Mistelbach, Austria under the Horizon 2020 WATERAGRI project, it aims to enhance soil fertility through nutrient recovery with minimal maintenance.
